missing_headers.purpose: Forces secure HTTPS communication and reduces downgrade risk.
Limits where scripts, frames, images, and other resources can load from.
Helps prevent clickjacking by controlling whether the site can be framed.
Controls how much referrer information is shared with other sites.
Limits browser features such as camera, microphone, and geolocation.

recommendations.title: Add Strict-Transport-Security
recommendations.guidance: Forces secure HTTPS communication and reduces downgrade risk.

recommendations.title: Add Content-Security-Policy
recommendations.guidance: Limits where scripts, frames, images, and other resources can load from.

recommendations.title: Add X-Frame-Options
recommendations.guidance: Helps prevent clickjacking by controlling whether the site can be framed.

recommendations.title: Add X-Content-Type-Options
recommendations.guidance: Helps prevent MIME-sniffing attacks.

recommendations.title: Add Referrer-Policy
recommendations.guidance: Controls how much referrer information is shared with other sites.

recommendations.title: Add Permissions-Policy
recommendations.guidance: Limits browser features such as camera, microphone, and geolocation.

assessment.executive_takeaway: Moderate exposure was detected. The environment needs validation, access review, and monitoring before production-style readiness.

recommendations.title: Review open port 445
recommendations.guidance: Restrict exposure, require VPN or private access, validate authentication, and review whether the service must be reachable.

assessment.executive_takeaway: High-priority exposure was detected. Review ownership, access controls, and remediation steps before treating this environment as ready.
